scene_input.scene_summary: The Quraysh begin to question and torture al-Mundhir ibn ʿAmr and Saʿd ibn ʿUbādah.
scene_input.key_visual_action: A Quraysh warrior holding a whip, with al-Mundhir and Saʿd in the background
scene_input.setting: A dark and dingy cell in Makkah

schema_output.scene_summary: The Quraysh begin to question and torture al-Mundhir ibn ʿAmr and Saʿd ibn ʿUbādah
schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 114
schema_output.moral_lesson: The suffering of the early Muslims and the importance of perseverance in the face of adversity

characters.name: Quraysh Warrior
characters.appearance: medium build, stern facial expression, wearing a dark leather tunic and woolen cloak with a distinctive curved sword at his side

characters.name: al-Mundhir ibn ʿAmr
characters.appearance: slender build, dressed in a simple white thobe with a plain brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering

characters.name: Saʿd ibn ʿUbādah
characters.appearance: tall build, dressed in a simple white thobe with a plain brown woolen cloak and a white cloth head covering

schema_output.narrative_text: The Quraysh began to question and torture al-Mundhir ibn ʿAmr and Saʿd ibn ʿUbādah, but they remained strong in their faith.

compliance.notes: The scene may be disturbing for young children, but it is essential to convey the hardships faced by the early Muslims.

schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. Dark and dingy cell in 7th century Makkah with rough stone walls and a low ceiling. Flickering torchlight casts eerie shadows on the walls, casting an ominous mood. In the center of the room, a Quraysh warrior stands with his back to the viewer, dressed in dark leather armor and a woolen cloak, holding a whip in his hand. In the background, two figures are seen from behind: al-Mundhir ibn ʿAmr and Saʿd ibn ʿUbādah, dressed in simple white thobes with plain brown woolen cloaks and white cloth head coverings. Soft warm golden light, tense and foreboding mood. Medium shot from above. Dark, muted palette with touches of golden light, emphasizing the somber atmosphere. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
